title: ligularia tussilaginea
intro: Ligularia tussilaginea, also known as the Leopard Plant, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Ligularia tussilaginea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
